title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS educational video demonstrating how to build AI agents using the Strands Agents SDK. The content covers a simple agent loop pattern where a model reasons about tools, selects appropriate ones, executes them, and iterates until reaching an answer. Four example agents are built progressively from simple calculator tools to multi-agent orchestrators.
